heading: Limit on rate of compensation of Senate officers and employees
label: 4574 Limit on rate of compensation of Senate officers and employees
text: No officer or employee of the Senate shall receive pay for any services performed by him at any rate higher than that provided for the office or employment to which he has been regularly appointed.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61 of this title
